scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @repo/contracts build && node scripts/sync-contracts-source.cjs && next dev -p 3001
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @repo/contracts build && node scripts/sync-contracts-source.cjs && next build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @repo/contracts build && node scripts/sync-contracts-source.cjs && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
